title: Dedicated Tool Categories
summary: Add Security, Databases, API & Network, and Developer categories so future tools are grouped cleanly.
acceptance: ToolCategory includes the new categories without breaking existing tools.
Sidebar grouping remains stable and searchable.
Registry tests verify all tools are categorized exactly once.

title: Reusable External Process Runner
summary: Extract a shared runner for ffmpeg, git, sqlite3, openssl, curl, and future local binaries.
acceptance: Runner captures stdout, stderr, exit code, timeout, and executable lookup failures.
VideoConverter uses the shared runner without behavior regressions.
Tests cover success, failure, missing executable, and timeout cases.

title: Shared File Result Handling
summary: Improve generated-file UX with explicit file URLs, Finder reveal actions, and shared save/open panels.
acceptance: PDF, image, and video tools expose generated file URLs consistently.
Views use shared reveal/copy/save controls where possible.
Collision-safe output behavior is preserved.

title: PDF Page Editor
summary: Add local PDF page editing: rotate, reorder, delete, extract ranges, and append pages with PDFKit.
acceptance: User can choose PDF pages and apply rotate, reorder, delete, extract, and append operations.
Operations produce real PDF files beside the source file by default.
Tests validate page counts and operation results with generated fixture PDFs.

title: PDF OCR Text Extractor
summary: Use Vision and PDFKit page rendering to extract text from scanned PDFs locally.
acceptance: OCR runs locally without network calls.
User can choose page ranges.
Output includes recognized text and confidence/diagnostic notes where available.

title: PDF Metadata Scrubber
summary: Remove title, author, subject, producer, and other metadata from PDFs.
acceptance: Inspect mode shows metadata fields before scrubbing.
Scrub mode writes a new PDF without selected metadata fields.
Tests verify metadata removal and page preservation.

title: Batch Image Resizer and Compressor
summary: Resize, compress, strip metadata, and batch-convert images locally.
acceptance: Users can process multiple image paths.
Resize by width, height, max dimension, or scale.
Output defaults beside each source image and avoids overwrites.

title: Video Clip and Audio Extract
summary: Trim video by start/end time, extract MP3/WAV/AAC, and generate thumbnails with ffmpeg.
acceptance: Video Converter supports trim start/end controls.
Audio extraction supports MP3, WAV, and AAC.
Generated outputs default to the source video folder.

title: Image Metadata Inspector
summary: Inspect and optionally scrub EXIF, GPS, color profile, and common image metadata.
acceptance: Image Converter inspect output includes common metadata sections.
Scrub mode writes a metadata-reduced copy where supported.
Tests cover metadata-free and metadata-present images.

title: JSON Schema Validator
summary: Validate JSON input against JSON Schema using a bundled offline validator.
acceptance: User can enter JSON and schema side-by-side.
Output lists validation errors with paths.
Runtime works offline after npm dependencies are vendored.

title: .env Inspector and Comparator
summary: Parse, compare, redact, and report missing keys across .env-style files.
acceptance: Tool parses .env content without leaking values in reports by default.
Comparator reports added, removed, changed, and missing keys.
Secret-looking values are redacted.

title: Git Diff and Ignore Helper
summary: Use local git to inspect diffs and help build .gitignore patterns.
acceptance: Tool can inspect a repository path and summarize changed files.
Tool can test ignore patterns against paths.
No destructive git commands are used.

title: Certificate Inspector
summary: Inspect PEM/DER certificates, expiry, SANs, issuer, subject, and fingerprints.
acceptance: Tool accepts PEM text and certificate file paths.
Output includes validity, SANs, issuer, subject, and SHA fingerprints.
Expired and near-expiry certificates surface diagnostics.

title: JWT and JWK Verifier Upgrade
summary: Extend JWT verification to RS256/ES256 with JWK import and claims linting.
acceptance: JWT debugger supports HS256/384/512 and RS256/ES256 verification paths.
JWK input supports key selection by kid.
Claims linting flags expiry, not-before, issuer, audience, and algorithm concerns.

title: File Hash and HMAC Tool
summary: Add streaming file hashes, HMAC, and checksum manifest verification.
acceptance: Hash tool supports text and file path input.
Large files are hashed without loading the entire file into memory.
Manifest verification reports pass/fail per file.

title: SQLite Browser and Query Runner
summary: Browse SQLite schema, preview tables, run queries, explain plans, and export CSV/JSON.
acceptance: Tool opens local SQLite database files read-only by default.
Schema, tables, columns, indexes, and preview rows are visible.
Query results can be copied or exported.

title: Connection String Parser
summary: Safely parse and redact PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and common service URLs.
acceptance: Output separates protocol, user, password redaction, host, port, database, and parameters.
Redacted output is the default.
Invalid URLs produce actionable diagnostics.

title: SQLite Schema Diff
summary: Compare schemas across two SQLite database files.
acceptance: Tool reports added, removed, and changed tables, columns, indexes, and triggers.
Diff output is stable and copyable.
Tests create fixture databases locally.

title: HTTP Request Builder
summary: Build local URLSession-based HTTP requests with headers, body, timing, and safe auth display.
acceptance: Tool supports method, URL, headers, and body input.
Response includes status, timing, headers, and body preview.
Sensitive headers are redacted in saved output by default.

title: cURL Import and Export
summary: Import cURL commands into structured requests and export structured requests back to cURL.
acceptance: Common cURL flags are parsed into method, headers, URL, and body.
Generated cURL output quotes values safely.
Parser avoids executing user-provided shell content.

title: OpenAPI Explorer
summary: Explore local OpenAPI JSON/YAML files and generate request templates.
acceptance: Tool parses local OpenAPI 3 JSON and YAML documents.
Endpoints are searchable by path, method, tag, and summary.
Selected endpoint can populate HTTP Request Builder input.

title: Plist, JSON, and YAML Converter
summary: Convert property lists to and from JSON/YAML using local serializers.
acceptance: Tool reads XML and binary plist files.
Tool converts plist to JSON and JSON to plist.
Errors identify unsupported value types.

title: Archive Inspector
summary: Inspect zip and tar archives locally without extracting everything by default.
acceptance: Tool lists archive entries, sizes, modified dates, and compression info.
Extraction is explicit and output defaults beside the source archive.
Path traversal entries are detected and blocked.

title: Cron Expression Explainer
summary: Explain cron expressions and show upcoming run times.
acceptance: Tool validates common 5-field cron syntax.
Output explains schedule in plain language.
Output lists upcoming run times in local timezone.

title: Local Static File Server
summary: Serve a local folder for quick previews with safe defaults.
acceptance: Tool starts and stops a local server for a selected folder.
Server binds to localhost by default.
UI displays the local URL and server logs.

title: Dependency Lockfile Inspector
summary: Inspect package-lock, Package.resolved, Podfile.lock, and similar dependency lockfiles.
acceptance: Tool summarizes dependencies, versions, sources, and duplicate packages.
Known lockfile formats are detected automatically.
Output is copyable as JSON or text.
